query:
SELECT g.id, g.awayTeam, g.homeTeam, g.gameDate, g.sport,
  bs.spreadAwayTickets, bs.spreadHomeTickets, bs.spreadAwayMoney, bs.spreadHomeMoney,
  bs.totalOverTickets, bs.totalUnderTickets, bs.mlAwayTickets, bs.mlHomeTickets,
  bs.updatedAt
FROM games g
LEFT JOIN bettingSplits bs ON bs.gameId = g.id
WHERE g.sport = 'NHL' AND g.gameDate = '2026-03-19'
  AND g.awayTeam IN ('new_york_islanders','new_york_rangers','montreal_canadiens')
ORDER BY g.awayTeam;
